results.title: Zambia’s former vice president Guy Scott dies at 82
results.description: He became Africa's ​first white head of state ‌in two decades when he briefly served as acting president in 2014 The post Zambia’s former vice president Guy Scott dies at 82 appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now .

results.title: Meet The Democrats Running To Replace Graham Platner
results.description: Eight Democrats are vying to replace former Senate nominee Graham Platner after he withdrew from the race last week following a string of scandals involving rape allegations, a Nazi tattoo, and controversial online posts that plagued his campaign. They will gather to debate on Thursday evening. Wednesday was the deadline to file with the Maine ...
